steps.title: Identify what objective to emphasize
steps.content: The student must emphasize the study's primary aim. The notes state this explicitly: to determine the benefits of UNAs in European cities.

steps.title: Find which choice emphasizes it
steps.content:
C makes determining UNA benefits the sentence's main point: “Determining the benefits of UNAs in European cities was a primary aim of the GREEN SURGE study.”
  • A describes the study's scope
  • B mentions an objective without stating what it is
  • D discusses what parks do biologically
.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
